This test checks the behavior of the 'Add methods to TYPE to implement an
interface...' code action.

-- capabilities.json --
{
	"experimental":{"interactiveInputTypes":["string"]}
}

-- flags --
-ignore_extra_diags

-- go.mod --
module golang.org/lsptests/implementinterface

go 1.18

-- bad/bad.go --
package bad

type foo struct{}

// Named
type namedOfPointer *foo //@codeaction("Pointer", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

type namedOfInterface error //@codeaction("Interface", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

// Alias
type aliasOfBasic = int //@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

type aliasOfInterface = error //@codeaction("Interface", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

type aliasOfPointer = *foo //@codeaction("Pointer", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

type aliasOfNamedPointer namedOfPointer //@codeaction("Pointer", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

type aliasOfNameInterface namedOfInterface //@codeaction("Interface", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

// Interface
type iface interface {} //@codeaction("iface", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

// Not package level
func _ () {
    type NamedOfBasic int //@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")

    type NamedOfStruct foo //@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", err=re"found 0 CodeActions")
}

-- good/good.go --
package good

type foo struct{}

// Named
type namedOfBasic int //@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedBasic)

type namedOfStruct foo //@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedStruct)

type namedOfFunc func(string) bool //@codeaction("Func", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedFunc)

type namedOfChannel chan struct{} //@codeaction("Channel", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedChannel)

// Struct
type structType struct{} //@codeaction("Type", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=struct)

type genericStructType[T any] struct{} //@codeaction("Type", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=genericStruct)

// Alias
type aliasOfNamedBasic namedOfBasic //@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=aliasNamedBasic)

type aliasOfNamedStruct namedOfStruct //@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=aliasNamedStruct)

-- @aliasNamedBasic/good/good.go --
@@ -20 +20,8 @@
-type aliasOfNamedBasic namedOfBasic //@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=aliasNamedBasic)
+type aliasOfNamedBasic namedOfBasic
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (a *aliasOfNamedBasic) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=aliasNamedBasic)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
-- @aliasNamedStruct/good/good.go --
@@ -22 +22,6 @@
-type aliasOfNamedStruct namedOfStruct //@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=aliasNamedStruct)
+type aliasOfNamedStruct namedOfStruct
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (a *aliasOfNamedStruct) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
@@ -24 +29 @@
+//@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=aliasNamedStruct)
-- @genericStruct/good/good.go --
@@ -17 +17,8 @@
-type genericStructType[T any] struct{} //@codeaction("Type", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=genericStruct)
+type genericStructType[T any] struct{}
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (g *genericStructType[T]) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Type", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=genericStruct)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
-- @namedBasic/good/good.go --
@@ -6 +6,8 @@
-type namedOfBasic int //@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedBasic)
+type namedOfBasic int
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (n *namedOfBasic) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Basic", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedBasic)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
-- @namedChannel/good/good.go --
@@ -12 +12,8 @@
-type namedOfChannel chan struct{} //@codeaction("Channel", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedChannel)
+type namedOfChannel chan struct{}
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (n *namedOfChannel) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Channel", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedChannel)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
-- @namedFunc/good/good.go --
@@ -10 +10,8 @@
-type namedOfFunc func(string) bool //@codeaction("Func", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedFunc)
+type namedOfFunc func(string) bool
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (n *namedOfFunc) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Func", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedFunc)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
-- @namedStruct/good/good.go --
@@ -8 +8,8 @@
-type namedOfStruct foo //@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedStruct)
+type namedOfStruct foo
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (n *namedOfStruct) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Struct", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=namedStruct)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
-- @struct/good/good.go --
@@ -15 +15,8 @@
-type structType struct{} //@codeaction("Type", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=struct)
+type structType struct{}
+
+// Error implements [error].
+func (s *structType) Error() string {
+	panic("unimplemented")
+}
+
+//@codeaction("Type", "refactor.rewrite.implementInterface", edit=struct)
@@ -23 +30 @@
-
